title: Ordinary People
tmdbOverview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.
synopsis: Ordinary People is a 2018 action, crime and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R18+ certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
